heading: Relationship to other laws
label: 735 Relationship to other laws
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)735(a)31:52–6(a)., , .Feb. 15, 1980Pub. L. 96–191, § 794 Stat. 33735(b)31:52–6(b).In subsection (a), the words “repealing, amending, or otherwise” are omitted as surplus.In subsection (b), the words “repeal . . . or limit” are omitted as surplus. The words “officers and” are added for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

Amendments2008—Subsec. (a). substituted “731(c) and (e),” for “731(c)–(e),”.Pub. L. 110–3232004—Subsec. (b). substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)735(a)31:52–6(a)., , .Feb. 15, 1980Pub. L. 96–191, § 794 Stat. 33735(b)31:52–6(b).In subsection (a), the words “repealing, amending, or otherwise” are omitted as surplus.In subsection (b), the words “repeal . . . or limit” are omitted as surplus. The words “officers and” are added for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

Amendments2008—Subsec. (a). substituted “731(c) and (e),” for “731(c)–(e),”.Pub. L. 110–3232004—Subsec. (b). substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271

children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided in , this subchapter and subchapter IV of this chapter do not affect sections 702(b), 703, 731(c) and (e), 772, 775(a) and (d) of this title.section 733(c) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Except as specifically provided in this subchapter and subchapter IV of this chapter, those subchapters do not change the application of a law applicable to officers and employees of the Government Accountability Office.
